captured_on.release: S/4HANA (S4G, EN); selection+list+ops confirmed identical on ECC 7.31 (EC2, JA)

reach.note: Job selection. Job name + user are plain GuiTextFields (txt, NOT ctxt). Status checkboxes chkBTCH2170-PRELIM(scheduled)/SCHEDUL(released)/READY/RUNNING(active)/FINISHED/ABORTED(cancelled). Dates ctxtBTCH2170-FROM_DATE/TO_DATE. Execute = sendVKey 8. Verified identical on S4G (EN) and EC2 (ECC 7.31, JA).

F8 from selection -> job list is a CLASSIC list (SAPMSSY0/120), NOT an ALV grid. A job row is a GuiLabel whose Text = the job name in the left DATA column (col<=12; the header echoes the selection criteria at col ~29 -- match only the data column). Select the row via setFocus, then: Job log = tbar[1]/btn[47], Spool = tbar[1]/btn[44]; DELETE = Shift+F2 (sendVKey 14) -> SAPLSPO1 'Delete selection?' confirm (btnSPOP-OPTION1=Yes) -- VKey, NOT the Job-menu index (menu[0]/menu[9] is Delete on S/4HANA but NOT on ECC 7.31); Cancel-active-job = Job menu mbar/menu[0]/menu[1] (S/4HANA-captured, needs a running job to verify on ECC); Back = tbar[0]/btn[3]. LIST/LOG verified live S4G(EN)+EC2(JA); full SM36-schedule -> SM37-delete round-trip verified on BOTH.
